details.test: Task 1: Complete profile and join Friday beginner group
Task 2: Book earliest affordable evening doubles match
Task 3: Book coaching session with well-rated coach under €40
Task 4: Invite three nearby players with similar skill
Task 5: Register for affordable amateur doubles tournament
Task 6: Reply to 'rackets for beginners' thread and bookmark
Task 7: Reserve used padel racket under $80 with free local pickup
Task 8: Adjust notification settings and quiet hours
Task 9: Create recurring Tuesday beginners match event
